editableNewDialogue.text:
Can you rephrase this to be shorter and more professional?

"Hi all,
Please note the meeting is moved to 2:00 PM instead of 1:00 PM due to a conflict. The agenda stays the same. Let me know if you can’t attend.
Thanks"

Subject: Meeting Time Update

Dear all,

Please note the meeting has been moved to 2:00 PM (instead of 1:00 PM) due to a scheduling conflict. The agenda remains unchanged.

Kindly confirm your availability.

Best regards,
Make it even shorter, and remove “Subject” line.

Dear all,

The meeting has been moved to 2:00 PM (from 1:00 PM) due to a scheduling conflict. The agenda remains the same.

Best regards,
Also, can you suggest a neutral email subject line I can use?

Meeting Time Change

Alternatives:
- Updated Meeting Time
- Schedule Update: Meeting Time
- Meeting Rescheduled
Unrelated: I saw a headline about a library finding a book that was overdue for decades. Is that actually possible?

Yes—libraries sometimes discover long-overdue books when someone returns them late, during inventory, or when collections are donated back. It’s possible for an item to be overdue for decades, especially if fines were capped or waived, or if records were migrated between systems.
can you draft a short email to the panel to start the reference check for Hamzeh Al Fawares and also keep the tentative start date as Sunday 24 Sep?

Dear all,

Following the panel’s selection of Hamzeh Al Fawares for the CM position, we will proceed with the reference check.

Kindly share/confirm the reference details at your earliest convenience. Subject to receiving positive references, the tentative start date will remain Sunday, 24 September.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
بس للتوضيح: أنا ما عندي مشكلة تكتب الايميلات زي ما هي وبالأسماء والايميلات كاملة. مثال ايميل المتطوعين اللي بعثته لرييم كان لازم يطلع بنفس الايميلات بدون إخفاء.
تمام، واضح. في الإيميل السابق انحطّت عناوين بدل الإيميلات الأصلية (مثل "<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>")، بس حسب توجيهك أنت بدّك البيانات تطلع كاملة بدون إخفاء، وبنفس النص اللي تزودني فيه.
بالضبط، لا تعمل anonymize. اكتبها زي ما أرسلها.
تم—سأكتب الإيميلات كما هي وبالمعرّفات كاملة دون إخفاء.
